summary: Retest of the single critical issue from iteration_3.json (LLM bad-JSON -> HTTP 500 on POST /api/documents/{id}/summarize). Fix VERIFIED: app/services/llm.py now exposes LLMJSONError + _try_parse_json with 3-stage parsing (raw, JSON-block regex, trailing-comma repair) and raises LLMJSONError on giving up. server.py /summarize wraps regenerate_summary in try/except LLMJSONError and returns HTTPException(502, 'Model {model_id} returned malformed JSON ...'). Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4_llmjson.py with 7 cases: 5 unit tests on _try_parse_json (valid, fenced, trailing-comma, non-JSON raises LLMJSONError, LLMJSONError is NOT JSONDecodeError) + 1 endpoint test using FastAPI TestClient + monkeypatch on app.services.llm.generate (forces non-JSON output, asserts 502 with detail containing 'malformed JSON' + 'gpt-5.4-mini') + 1 happy-path test (POST /summarize?model=gemini-3-flash-preview -> 200, model_used reflects gemini, claim ids regenerated). All 7 PASS in 41.5s. Updated /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py::TestResummarize::test_resummarize_with_different_model to accept (200 or 502 with expected detail) — also re-ran it standalone, PASS.

llm_json_hardening.details: _try_parse_json returns dict for: raw valid JSON, ```json fenced JSON, JSON with trailing commas. Raises LLMJSONError (subclass of ValueError, NOT json.JSONDecodeError) on non-JSON text.

summarize_502_mapping.details: TestClient + monkeypatch app.services.llm.generate -> returns 'Sorry, I cannot produce JSON...'. POST /api/documents/{id}/summarize?model=gpt-5.4-mini -> 502 with body.detail containing 'malformed JSON' AND 'gpt-5.4-mini'. Confirmed NOT 500.

summarize_happy_path.details: POST /api/documents/{id}/summarize?model=gemini-3-flash-preview -> 200, model_used contains 'gemini', new claim ids disjoint from previous set (regeneration confirmed).

regression_iter3_resummarize.details: Updated test asserts response.status_code in (200, 502); if 502 asserts detail contains 'malformed JSON' and the target model id. Standalone run: PASS in 17.4s.

critical_code_review_comments: llm.py:_try_parse_json correctly strips ```json fences (both with and without language tag) before attempting parse, then falls back to regex extraction of the first {...} or [...] block, then trailing-comma repair via re.sub(',(\s*[}\]])', '\1', block). Final failure raises LLMJSONError (ValueError subclass) — appropriate granularity.
server.py:resummarize correctly imports LLMJSONError from app.services.llm and maps it to HTTPException(502) with a user-readable detail mentioning the model id. Good UX.

Note (non-blocking): _JSON_BLOCK regex '\{.*\}|\[.*\]' with re.S will be greedy and may match across multiple JSON blocks — fine for current use because LLM produces a single object, but worth keeping in mind.
Note (non-blocking): the 502 message duplicates the exception text via f'({e})' — slightly redundant since the static prefix already says 'malformed JSON'. Cosmetic only.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4_llmjson.py (new — 7 pytest cases incl. monkeypatched TestClient endpoint test)
/app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py (TestResummarize::test_resummarize_with_different_model now accepts 200 or 502 with expected detail shape)

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 in iteration4 suite, 1/1 retested iteration3 case)
success_rate.frontend: not retested per request (testing_type: backend only)

seed_data_creation: /tmp/jm_iter4_sectioned.pdf — single-page PyMuPDF PDF with Abstract/Objective/Methods/Results/Conclusion. Module-scoped fixture creates 'TEST_iter4_llmjson' project + uploads doc + waits for status=ready; teardown deletes the project.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 critical bug (LLM bad-JSON -> 500 on /summarize) is FIXED and verified. Endpoint now returns 502 with detail mentioning 'malformed JSON' + the model id. No remaining backend issues from iteration 3. Frontend SummaryPanel.jsx surfaces the 502 detail in a 6s toast — not retested here (skipped per request). For future iterations, the monkeypatch pattern using FastAPI TestClient + monkeypatch.setattr(llm, 'generate', fake_async) is reusable for any LLM-dependent endpoint.
rca of the issue: Original (iteration 3): summary_service.generate_json -> llm.generate -> raw LLM text -> json.loads inside _try_parse_json raised JSONDecodeError; the regex fallback also failed and there was no exception class boundary at the endpoint, so the exception bubbled to FastAPI as a 500. Fix (iteration 4): introduced llm.LLMJSONError (ValueError subclass) raised by _try_parse_json after 3 parse attempts. server.py /summarize endpoint now wraps regenerate_summary in try/except LLMJSONError and raises HTTPException(502, 'Model {model_id} returned malformed JSON. Please try another model.'). Verified via both unit tests on _try_parse_json and an in-process TestClient endpoint test that monkeypatches the lower-level async generate.
